properties.remark: THUNDERSTORM OUTFLOW CAUSED VISIBILITY TO BE REDUCED TO ONE QUARTER MILE ALONG INTERSTATE 84 NEAR THE REW ELEVATOR.
SEVERAL BRANCHES BLOWN DOWN, LARGEST IN DIAMETER WAS 5 INCHES.
STRONG THUNDERSTORM WINDS CAUSED POWER OUTAGE IN MISSION AND CAYUSE AREA IN UMATILLA COUNTY.
STRONG THUNDERSTORM WINDS CUASED POWER OUTAGE IN THE ENTERPRISE AREA OF OREGON, IN WALLOWA COUNTY.
UMATILLA ELECTRIC REPORTS COTTONWOOD TREES BLOWN DOWN ON POWER LINES AT SEVERAL LOCATIONS BETWEEN PENDLETON AND NOLIN, OR CAUSING POWER OUTAGES. REPAIRS WERE MADE LATE SATURDAY AND AGAIN ON SUNDAY.
NEW METAL ROOF BLOWN LOOSE AND RATTLING UP AND DOWN. HOME IS LOCATED ON AIRPORT HILL.
HAIL WITH THE DIAMETER OF A QUARTER REPORTED BY TRAINED SPOTTER.
HAIL RANGING IN SIZE BETWEEN 3/4 AND ONE INCH IN DIAMETER. BEGINNING TO LIGHTEN UP IN INTENSITY.
TREE BRANCHES DOWN DUE TO WINDS +50 MPH.

MORROW COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT REPORTS TREES DOWN ON HOUSES...POWER POLES AND POWER LINES DOWN IN THE SOUTH SIDE OF IRRIGON. WIND DAMAGE TO NUMEROUS HOUSES AND BUILDINGS IN THE IRRIGON AREA. HIGH WIND ALSO DAMAGED A TRAFFIC CONTROL BARRIER IN THE UMATILLA CHEMICAL DEPOT.
EXCESS OF 22 POWER POLES WERE DOWN FROM PATERSON FERRY ROAD TO IRRIGON.
NUMEROUS TREES DOWN AND POWER LINES OVERNIGHT IN EAST IRRIGON. ESTIMATED TIME AROUND 10 PM.
HANFORD ARMY LOOP ROAD MESONET STATION REPORTED A WIND GUST OF 61 MPH.
THUNDERSTORM WIND GUST BLEW OFF A CARPORT ROOF.
TREES DOWN. LOST SHINGLES FROM ROOFS. RADIO STATION TOWER STRUCK BY LIGHTNING AND THE STATION WAS OFF THE AIR.
GRANT COUNTY SHERIFF REMOVED FROM ROAD 3FT LONG LIMBS 1 TO 2 INCH IN DIAMETER NEAR MT VERNON.
WIND CAUSED POWER LINE TO FALL.
MESONET STATION IN UKIAH RECORDED PEAK WIND GUST TO 62 MPH FROM THUNDERSTORM.
2 INCH DIAMETER TREE BRANCH DOWN. WIND IS HOWLING.
THUNDERSTORM WINDS DOWNED DOZENS OF TREE BRANCHES...LARGEST 12 INCHES DIAMETER.
2 INCH DIAMETER TREE LIMBS ARE DOWN. WIND GUST ESTIMATED AT 45 MPH.
NWS PENDLETON AUTOMATED STATION RECORDED 59 MPH PEAK WIND GUST.
UPDATED...NWS PENDLETON AUTOMATED STATION RECORDED PEAK WIND GUST OF 62 MPH.
MANY TREE BRANCHES DOWN ACROSS PENDLETON FROM THUNDERSTORM WINDS...LARGEST ONE ABOUT 4 INCHES IN DIAMETER.
HIGH WINDS FROM THUNDERSTORM CAUSED 12 INCH DIAMETER TREE TO BREAK AND FALL AGAINST HOUSE. ALSO MANY OTHER TREE LIMBS DOWN...AND POWER OUTAGE CONTINUES.
1 INCH HAIL - PRINEVILLE POLICE DEPT.
DIME, QUARTER, PENNY, AND A FEW LARGER THAN QUARTER SIZE HAIL FELL.
GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL REPORTED AT ROUND MOUNTAIN LOOKOUT.
QUARTER SIZE HAIL IN DIAMETER REPORTED.
RECEIVED HAIL ONE INCH IN DIAMETER AND RECORDED WIND GUST OF 53 MPH AT 421PM
QUARTER SIZE HAIL REPORTED FROM STORM.
QUARTER SIZE HAIL AND LOCALIZED FLOODING FROM STORM. CAR WINDSHIELD CRACKED FROM HAIL.
HEAVY RAIN. HAIL THE SIZE OF A QUARTER FALLING.
WIND TOOK DOWN OVER 1 DOZEN TREE BRANCHES GREATER THAN 2 INCHES IN DIAMETER.
